hooks.command: branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" != "main" ] && [ -n "$branch" ]; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"SessionStart\",\"additionalContext\":\"WARNING: You are on branch '$branch', NOT main. Run 'git checkout main && git pull origin main' before making any changes. Check CLAUDE.md for design decisions before modifying navigation or removing/adding features.\"}}"; else behind=$(git rev-list HEAD..origin/main --count 2>/dev/null); if [ "$behind" != "0" ] && [ -n "$behind" ]; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"SessionStart\",\"additionalContext\":\"WARNING: Your main branch is $behind commits behind origin/main. Run 'git pull origin main' before making any changes.\"}}"; fi; fi

hooks.prompt:
Before finishing, check if any significant changes were made this session (new features, removed features, design decisions, navigation changes, new pages, API changes). If so, update these files:

1. CLAUDE.md — Update the 'Navigation design' section if nav changed. Add any new design decisions or conventions that future sessions need to know about.
2. DEVELOPMENT-ROADMAP.md — Add a dated entry for any features added, changed, or removed.

Only update if meaningful changes were made. Do NOT update for minor bug fixes, typos, or config changes. If you update files, commit them with message 'Update project docs with session changes'.

Context was just compacted. Important design decisions or progress may be lost. Review what you know about this session and ensure any key decisions (especially about navigation structure, removed/added features, or architectural changes) are saved to CLAUDE.md. Check CLAUDE.md now and update it if any recent decisions are missing.
